title: Story Pack: PM operating rhythm automation

prioritization.priority_rationale: The story pack is the first delivery handoff and must stay tightly aligned with the PRD scope and PM review boundary.
prioritization.reviewer_handoff: Engineering and QA should confirm the stories are specific enough to implement without inferring extra scope.

delivery_burden_summary: The slice is bounded to one PM-facing draft path, but it still carries dependency on high-quality workspace state and ambiguity checks.
ambiguity_notes: The status draft should request PM context only when required evidence is missing.
Source freshness thresholds must remain explicit before a draft is considered acceptable.

stories.title: Generate status draft from workspace state
stories.narrative: As a PM, I want ProductOS to draft a status update from current artifacts so I do not manually reconstruct work every cycle.
testability_notes: The draft must cover required status sections from current workspace artifacts.
The draft must show when source quality is too weak to proceed safely.

implementation_context_refs.title: Status Draft Engineering Handoff
implementation_context_refs.summary: Execution notes, required source artifacts, and edge cases for the delivery team.
